name: "Crimson Flow"
description: After the Traveler spoke to Tubby about certain strange images lingering in their memory, Tubby recreated this mysterious ornament using a few unusual materials based on the Traveler's description. Seen from a distance, it resembles a mass of crimson flames in motion. A closer look, however, reveals that the flickering form is composed of crimson cubes, creating a spectacle entirely different from real fire.\nAs a decorative piece, the ornament is perfectly safe. The mysterious substance that flows like flame carries no heat and will not ignite anything nearby...
